evidence.fact: Users can optionally upload multiple images to a post.
evidence.fact_span: Users can optionally upload multiple images to a post.

evidence.claim: The user has friends with posts.
evidence.fact: The news feed lists posts from friends.
evidence.fact_span: The news feed lists posts from friends.

evidence.fact: Logged admin actions include ban, delete, and verify.
evidence.fact_span: Logged admin actions include ban, delete, and verify.

evidence.fact: The platform facilitates sharing of text and media content among its users and provides tools for community management.
evidence.fact_span: The platform facilitates sharing of text and media content among its users and provides tools for community management.
